【左侧带未读红点的列表项】
<div data-v-cef20bf0="" d-c="61017" class="geek-item-wrap"><!----> <div data-v-cef20bf0="" id="_749418519-0" data-id="749418519-0" class="geek-item"><!----> <!----> <div data-v-cef20bf0="" class="figure"><span data-v-7778bec2="" data-v-cef20bf0="" class="badge"><div data-v-213af8b4="" data-v-cef20bf0="" class="image-content" data-v-7778bec2="" style="width: 44px; height: 44px;"><img data-v-4ee17ccb="" data-v-213af8b4="" src="https://img.bosszhipin.com/boss/avatar/avatar_9.png?x-oss-process=image/resize,l_900,h_600/format,webp" alt="" class="image-square"></div> <span data-v-7778bec2="" class="badge-count badge-count-common-less"><span data-v-7778bec2="">4</span></span></span> <!----></div> <div data-v-cef20bf0="" class="text uid"><div data-v-cef20bf0="" class="title"><span data-v-cef20bf0="" class="time time-shadow">
                08:52
            </span> <span data-v-cef20bf0="" class="geek-item-top"><span data-v-cef20bf0="" title="陆中慧" class="geek-name">陆中慧</span> <span data-v-cef20bf0="" title="75/时 便利店驻店/咖啡/零食/奶茶 提供住宿" class="source-job source-job-width">75/时 便利店驻店/咖啡/零食/奶茶 提供住宿</span> <span data-v-cef20bf0="" class="source-title">优选额外曝光
                </span> <!----></span> <div data-v-cef20bf0="" class="gray"><div data-v-cef20bf0="" class="user-operation"><img data-v-cef20bf0="" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" class="icon-operate list-operate"> <img data-v-cef20bf0="" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" class="icon-operate list-operate-hover"></div> <!----><span data-v-cef20bf0="" class="push-text">***********</span></div></div></div></div></div>

【我发出的气泡】
<div class="item-myself clearfix"><div class="text"><i class="status status-read" style="color: rgb(0, 166, 167);">已读</i> <span>你好！我是人事娜娜
<br>直招骑手哦！！肯德基配送！
1、免费提供电车、住宿、装备<br>2、上下班无需打卡，日均40-80单，薪资在 8000➕<br>3、无经验有师傅带【超时差评不罚款】
4 、可预支工资，解决生活问题
<br>可以就近安排站点，请问目前你在哪个区域？？</span></div> <!----></div>

【候选人发出的气泡】
<div class="item-friend clearfix"><div class="text"><!----> <span>17可以做吗</span></div> <div data-v-3f4a7731="" class="figure"><div data-v-3f4a7731="" class="avatar-content"><img data-v-3f4a7731="" src="https://img.bosszhipin.com/boss/avatar/avatar_12.png"></div></div></div>

class="boss-btn-primary boss-btn">确定</span></div></div></span> <span data-v-95663090="" class="operate-item"><span data-v-95663090="" ka="get_phone_744360720" class="iboss-phone btn-bar 【可以直接复制电话号码的卡片】
<div class="message-card-wrap green"><div class="message-card-top-wrap"><div class="message-card-top-icon-content"><span class="message-dialog-icon message-dialog-icon-contact"></span></div> <div class="message-card-top-content"><div class="message-card-top-title-wrap"><h3 class="message-card-top-title message-card-top-text">张张从玉的手机号：<br>19117912141</h3></div> <!----> <!----></div></div> <!---->  <div class="message-card-buttons"><span class="card-btn">复制手机号</span></div></div>

【确认是否交换微信的卡片】
<div data-v-457fdb22="" class="message-card-wrap green"><div class="message-card-top-wrap"><div class="message-card-top-icon-content"><span data-v-457fdb22="" class="message-dialog-icon message-dialog-icon-weixin"></span></div> <div class="message-card-top-content"><div class="message-card-top-title-wrap"><h3 class="message-card-top-title message-card-top-text">我想要和您交换微信，您是否同意</h3></div> <!----> <p data-v-457fdb22="" class="dialog-exchange-content"></p></div></div> <!---->  <div class="message-card-buttons"><span class="card-btn">拒绝</span><span d-c="61031" class="card-btn">同意</span></div></div>

【提醒是否交换微信的蓝色提示信息】
<div class="notice-list notice-blue-list"><div class="text">我想要和您交换微信，您是否同意</div> <div class="op"><a href="javascript:;">拒绝</a> <a href="javascript:;" class="btn">同意</a></div></div>

【全部tap】
<div data-v-e62f5ca2="" title="全部" class="chat-label-item selected"><span data-v-7778bec2="" data-v-e62f5ca2="" class="badge"><span data-v-e62f5ca2="" data-v-7778bec2="" class="content">
                    全部<!----></span> <!----></span></div>

【带有交换卡片的完整聊天窗口】
<div data-v-0e2d1b7d="" class="chat-message-list is-to-top"><div data-v-0e2d1b7d="" class="message-item"><div class="message-time"><span class="time">昨天 09:52</span></div> <div class="item-system clearfix"><div class="text"><!----> <span>该牛人通过”优选额外曝光“邀请，若您对牛人感兴趣请及时回复</span></div> <!----></div> <!----></div><div data-v-0e2d1b7d="" class="message-item"><!----> <div class="item-friend clearfix"><div class="text"><!----> <span>您好，这是我的微信</span></div> <div data-v-3f4a7731="" class="figure"><div data-v-3f4a7731="" class="avatar-content"><img data-v-3f4a7731="" src="https://img.bosszhipin.com/boss/avatar/avatar_8.png"></div></div></div> <!----></div><div data-v-0e2d1b7d="" class="message-item"><!----> <div><div data-v-457fdb22="" class="item-friend" geek-info="[object Object]"><div data-v-457fdb22="" class="text reset-message-text"><!----> <div data-v-457fdb22="" class="message-card-wrap green"><div class="message-card-top-wrap"><div class="message-card-top-icon-content"><span data-v-457fdb22="" class="message-dialog-icon message-dialog-icon-weixin"></span></div> <div class="message-card-top-content"><div class="message-card-top-title-wrap"><h3 class="message-card-top-title message-card-top-text">我想要和您交换微信，您是否同意</h3></div> <!----> <p data-v-457fdb22="" class="dialog-exchange-content"></p></div></div> <!---->  <div class="message-card-buttons"><span class="card-btn">拒绝</span><span d-c="61031" class="card-btn">同意</span></div></div></div> <div data-v-3f4a7731="" data-v-457fdb22="" class="figure"><div data-v-3f4a7731="" class="avatar-content"><img data-v-3f4a7731="" src="https://img.bosszhipin.com/boss/avatar/avatar_8.png"></div></div></div></div> <!----></div><div data-v-0e2d1b7d="" class="message-item"><div class="message-time"><span class="time"> 11:34</span></div> <div class="item-myself clearfix"><div class="text"><i class="status status-delivery" style="color: rgb(153, 153, 153);">送达</i> <span>您好，我是美团骑手招聘专员。我们站点覆盖全徐州，可以根据您的住址就近安排，方便的话可以加个微信详细聊聊吗？</span></div> <!----></div> <!----></div></div>
